explanations.10: The 'use Dispatchable' statement adds special methods to this class that let it be sent through Laravel's event system.
explanations.12: The 'private Employee $employee' syntax means this Employee object is stored as a private property and automatically assigned from the constructor parameter.
explanations.16: This method modifies the employee and returns '$this' (the event object itself), which lets you chain multiple setters together like setFirstName(...)->setLastName(...).
